name: EDGE001
input: Configure Advantage 2" Group 1 with a width of exactly 24 inches and a height of 30 inches.
expected_output: The configuration is valid because both the width and height are at the minimum supported values.

name: EDGE002
input: Configure Advantage 2" Group 1 with a width of exactly 96 inches and a height of 84 inches.
expected_output: The configuration is valid because both the width and height are at the maximum supported values.

name: EDGE003
input: I selected the color 'Textured Lily'. Do I need to choose the Style Name manually?
expected_output: No. The Style Name is automatically set to Premium based on the product configuration rule.

name: EDGE004
input: I selected the color 'Gravel'. Can I change the Style Name to Premium?
expected_output: No. The Style Name is automatically set to Solids for Gravel according to the product rule.

name: EDGE005
input: I selected Continuous Valance as Yes. What additional option becomes available?
expected_output: Selecting Continuous Valance as Yes makes the Valance Width option available.

name: EDGE006
input: I selected Valance Returns as Yes. Which additional options become available?
expected_output: Selecting Valance Returns as Yes displays the Return Length and Corner Type options.
context: Actions: Show Return Length and Corner Type

name: EDGE007
input: I selected Return Length Override as Yes. What happens next?
expected_output: Selecting Return Length Override as Yes makes the Return Size option available.

name: EDGE008
input: I selected the color 'Pecan Pie'. Which sub-product is loaded automatically?
expected_output: The product automatically loads the sub-product 'Advantage 2" Group 1'.

name: EDGE009
input: I selected the color 'Walnut Grove'. Which Style Name is applied automatically?
expected_output: No Style Name is automatically applied unless a matching style rule exists for the selected color.

name: EDGE010
input: I configured Advantage 2" Group 1 using the minimum width of 24 inches and the maximum height of 84 inches. Is the configuration valid?
expected_output: Yes. The configuration is valid because both values are within the supported boundary limits.

name: EDGE011
input: I selected the color 'Lily'. Which Style Name will be applied automatically?
expected_output: The Style Name will automatically be set to Solids because Lily satisfies the Solid Styles rule.

name: EDGE020
input: I selected Pecan Pie multiple times while configuring the product. Which sub-product should remain loaded?
expected_output: The configuration should continue using the Advantage 2" Group 1 sub-product because the same rule is applied consistently for the selected color.
